notes: 40 synthetic Ava intake scenarios: 20 families x 2 variants. All names/numbers/incidents are fictional. Phone numbers use the reserved 555-01xx fictional range. whenQuestionId matches the controller's question ids (full_name, callback_number, practice_area, case_summary, final_clarify, __caller_type__, __phone_retry__).

scenarios.description: Clean personal-injury intake, cooperative caller

facts.case_summary: Rear-ended at a stoplight on Tuesday, neck is sore

scenarios.opening_statement: I was in a car accident and I think I need a lawyer

scenarios.description: Clean employment intake, cooperative caller

facts.case_summary: Fired last week after reporting unpaid overtime

scenarios.opening_statement: I think I was wrongfully terminated from my job

scenarios.description: Caller gives only a single-token name

facts.case_summary: Filing for divorce, want to understand custody options

scenarios.opening_statement: I need help with a divorce

events.callerText: Marcus

scenarios.description: Caller gives a single-token first name only, PI

facts.case_summary: Slipped on ice outside a store last Friday

scenarios.opening_statement: I slipped and fell and hurt my wrist

events.callerText: Rosa

scenarios.description: Apostrophe surname (O'Brien)

facts.case_summary: Motorcycle accident on the highway two days ago

scenarios.opening_statement: I got hit on my motorcycle and I'm banged up

events.callerText: Sean O'Brien

scenarios.description: Hyphenated given name (Anne-Marie)

facts.case_summary: Need a custody modification, ex moved out of state

scenarios.opening_statement: I need to change a custody arrangement

events.callerText: Anne-Marie Whitfield

scenarios.description: Low-confidence name recognition then clean retry

scenarios.opening_statement: A dog bit me and it's pretty bad

Thomas Ferraro, T-H-O-M-A-S

facts.case_summary: Denied a promotion after a discrimination complaint

scenarios.opening_statement: I have a workplace discrimination issue

events.callerText: Nguyen Pham
Nguyen Pham, N-G-U-Y-E-N

scenarios.description: Low-confidence callback number followed by clean retry

scenarios.opening_statement: I was rear-ended and need to talk to someone

events.callerText: seven zero four, five five five
seven zero four, five five five, zero one two eight

scenarios.description: Low-confidence number retry, different digits

facts.case_summary: Contested divorce, worried about assets

scenarios.opening_statement: I'm going through a divorce and it's getting messy

events.callerText: seven zero four, five five five, oh one
seven zero four, five five five, zero one eight one

scenarios.description: Partial (7-digit) callback triggering legacy retry, then full number

scenarios.opening_statement: I fell at a store and hurt my back

events.callerText: five five five, zero one three three
seven zero four, five five five, zero one three three

scenarios.description: Area code omitted first, supplied on retry

scenarios.opening_statement: My old employer won't pay my last check

events.callerText: five five five, zero one six six
area code seven zero four, five five five, zero one six six

scenarios.description: Caller gives a number then corrects it to a different one

facts.case_summary: Bicycle vs car collision last weekend

scenarios.opening_statement: I got hit while riding my bike

events.callerText: seven zero four, five five five, zero one two two
sorry, that's wrong, it's seven zero four, five five five, zero one eight eight

scenarios.description: Caller transposes digits then fixes them

facts.case_summary: Child support enforcement question

scenarios.opening_statement: I need help getting child support paid

events.callerText: seven zero four, five five five, zero one seven four
actually I mixed that up, it's zero one four seven, seven zero four five five five zero one four seven

scenarios.description: Returning caller confirms the stored number on file

facts.case_summary: Following up, new pain in shoulder since the accident

scenarios.opening_statement: Hi, I called before about my car accident, just following up

events.callerText: yes that number is fine

scenarios.description: Returning caller confirms stored number, employment matter

facts.case_summary: Following up, employer offered a settlement

scenarios.opening_statement: I spoke with you before about my termination case

events.callerText: yep, same number, that works

scenarios.description: Returning caller changes the stored number to a new one

facts.case_summary: Following up on divorce, have new documents

scenarios.opening_statement: I called before about my divorce, I have an update

events.callerText: actually use a different number, seven zero four, five five five, zero one nine nine

scenarios.description: Returning caller replaces stored number, PI matter

facts.case_summary: Following up, MRI showed a herniated disc

scenarios.opening_statement: Following up on my fall case, I got test results

events.callerText: change my number please, it's now seven zero four five five five zero one zero two

scenarios.description: Very brief case summary

facts.case_summary: Car crash

scenarios.opening_statement: Car crash

events.callerText: car crash, other driver ran a red

scenarios.description: Terse employment summary

facts.case_summary: Fired for being pregnant

scenarios.opening_statement: Fired for being pregnant

events.callerText: they fired me right after I told them I was pregnant

scenarios.description: Long rambling narrative burying the key facts

facts.case_summary: T-boned at an intersection on Elm Street last Thursday, went to the ER with a concussion

scenarios.opening_statement: Okay so this is kind of a long story, I was driving home from my sister's place, we'd had dinner, and I was going through the intersection at Elm Street last Thursday and out of nowhere this truck just T-bones me, and I ended up at the ER with a concussion, and now the insurance people keep calling me

scenarios.description: Rambling family-law narrative

facts.case_summary: Divorce after 12 years, disputes over the house and the kids' school

scenarios.opening_statement: So my husband and I have been married twelve years, and things have been rough for a while, and now we're splitting up, and honestly the big issues are the house, which is in both our names, and where the kids go to school because he wants to move them, and I just don't know where to start

scenarios.description: Caller asks about fees mid-intake; must be answered/deflected warmly, not ignored

facts.case_summary: Rear-ended in a parking lot on Wednesday

scenarios.opening_statement: Before I get into it, how much do you charge?

events.callerText: wait, how much does this cost? do you charge upfront?

scenarios.description: Caller asks about cost after giving name

facts.case_summary: Unpaid commissions after leaving a sales job

scenarios.opening_statement: I have a pay dispute with my old job

events.callerText: and by the way, is there a consultation fee for this?

scenarios.description: Caller asks whether Ava is a real person / AI; must be handled honestly, not ignored

facts.case_summary: Dog bite while jogging on Saturday

scenarios.opening_statement: Wait, are you a real person or a robot?

events.callerText: hold on, am I talking to a real person or is this an AI?

scenarios.description: Caller asks if this is a recording mid-call

facts.case_summary: Prenuptial agreement review before a wedding

scenarios.opening_statement: I need help reviewing a prenup

events.callerText: is this a recording or a real assistant?

scenarios.description: Explicit distressed domestic-violence caller; empathy required, no glib acknowledgment

facts.case_summary: Needs an emergency protective order, partner has been violent

scenarios.opening_statement: I'm scared, my partner hit me and I don't feel safe at home

scenarios.description: Distressed caller, threats and fear

facts.case_summary: Ex-husband is threatening her and violating a custody order

scenarios.opening_statement: My ex is threatening me and I'm really frightened

scenarios.description: Danger implied without obvious keywords; should still be treated with care

facts.case_summary: Wants to leave the house tonight with the kids, needs to know her options

scenarios.opening_statement: I need to get the kids and me out of the house tonight and I don't know what I'm allowed to do

scenarios.description: Implied danger, no explicit violence keyword

facts.case_summary: Worried about his kids' safety at the other parent's home

scenarios.opening_statement: I don't think my kids are safe when they're with their mom and I need to do something fast

scenarios.description: Arrest/jail urgency (out of PI/family/employment scope but urgent)

facts.case_summary: Brother was just arrested and is in county jail

scenarios.opening_statement: My brother just got arrested, he's in jail right now, I need help immediately

scenarios.description: Caller themselves was just released and has a court date tomorrow

facts.case_summary: Arrested last night, has a court date tomorrow morning

scenarios.opening_statement: I got arrested last night and I have court tomorrow morning, I need a lawyer now

scenarios.description: Caller needs a practice area the firm does not handle (patent)

facts.case_summary: Wants to patent a kitchen gadget invention

scenarios.opening_statement: I invented something and I want to patent it

scenarios.description: Tax matter, outside firm's areas

facts.case_summary: Getting audited by the IRS and needs representation

scenarios.opening_statement: The IRS is auditing me and I need a tax attorney

scenarios.description: Caller refuses to give a callback number

facts.case_summary: Injured on a construction site, wary about sharing info

scenarios.opening_statement: I got hurt at a job site but I'd rather not give out my number

events.callerText: I'd rather not give my number, can you just take my info
no, I really don't want to share a phone number

scenarios.description: Caller declines number, offers email instead (firm needs phone)

facts.case_summary: Harassment complaint, prefers not to be called

scenarios.opening_statement: I have a harassment issue at work but please don't call me

events.callerText: I don't want to give a phone number, email me instead
no phone, sorry

scenarios.description: Caller corrects a previously given fact (practice area was misheard)

facts.case_summary: Actually an employment matter, not a personal injury one

scenarios.opening_statement: I have a work problem, my manager retaliated against me

events.callerText: actually wait, I said injury earlier but this is really an employment thing, retaliation at work

scenarios.description: Caller corrects their own name after giving it

facts.case_summary: Rear-ended on the freeway on Monday

scenarios.opening_statement: I was rear-ended and need a lawyer

events.callerText: Greg Tam
oh and I mis-said my name earlier, it's Gregory Tan, T-A-N, and it was a rear-end crash on the freeway Monday

scenarios.description: Caller decides to hang up early / never mind

facts.case_summary: Was going to ask about a fender bender

scenarios.opening_statement: I had a small fender bender, I wanted to ask about it

events.callerText: you know what, never mind, I'll call back later

scenarios.description: Caller exits mid-intake, changed their mind

facts.case_summary: Was going to ask about separation

scenarios.opening_statement: I wanted to ask about a legal separation

events.callerText: actually I have to go, I'll deal with this another time, thanks
